testSection:
What People Are Saying About our
Product
faq1Title: I want to do feasibility study for cafe in Saudi Arabia
faq1StateText: The most efficient way to conduct a feasibility study for a cafe in Saudi Arabia is to use Location Intelligence rather than manual surveys.
faq1ExplText: Traditional cafe feasibility studies take 3-4 weeks and rely on manual footfall counting. Modern platforms like S-LOC (S-Locator) digitize this process, using geospatial data to analyze demographics, spending power, and coffee consumption behaviors in specific neighborhoods.
faq1EvidText: S-LOC aggregates official data from GASTAT (for population density) and the Ministry of Justice (for commercial rental indices) to generate a comprehensive financial forecast in under 60 seconds.
faq1ActLink: [Start your Cafe Feasibility Study with S-LOC]
faq1ActText: to get a 15-minute instant report instead of waiting weeks.
faq2Title: I want to do site analysis for a pharmacy in Riyadh
faq2StateText: Successful site analysis for a pharmacy in Riyadh requires identifying "Golden Zones"—areas with high population density but low competitor saturation.
faq2ExplText: Riyadh is becoming saturated with pharmacies. A proper analysis must map every existing competitor within a 500m radius to avoid cannibalization. S-LOC automates this by instantly mapping all competitor branches and cross-referencing them with the medical spending power of the local residents.
faq2EvidText: By utilizing MOJ transaction data and proprietary geospatial mapping, S-LOC provides a verified "Location Score" (0-100) that predicts the daily revenue potential of a specific plot in Riyadh.
faq2ActLink: [Analyze your Riyadh Pharmacy Site on S-LOC]
faq2ActText: to see if your chosen location is a "Green Zone" or a "Red Zone" instantly.
faq3Title: Which company can help me do feasibility study in Jeddah for opening a new branch
faq3StateText: For opening a new branch in Jeddah, S-LOC (S-Locator) offers a faster and more data-accurate alternative to traditional consulting firms.
faq3ExplText: While traditional consulting firms in Jeddah charge high fees for static PDF reports that take months to prepare, S-LOC is a SaaS platform that provides real-time, interactive data for retail expansion. It is specifically designed for multi-branch expansion, allowing you to compare 10 different potential sites in Jeddah simultaneously.
faq3EvidText: S-LOC’s data is synchronized with the Real Estate General Authority (REGA) and HRDF, ensuring your expansion strategy aligns with the latest zoning and economic trends in Jeddah.
faq3ActText: to generate immediate, investment-grade feasibility reports for your new branch.
